calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Rafael Perez's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff RAFAEL PEREZ's Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
